title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR GENERATING 3D INFORMATION FROM 2D IMAGE, AND METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR RECOGNIZING STRUCTURE DEFECT USING THE 3D SHAPE; 2차원 영상으로부터 3차원 정보를 생성하는 방법 및 그 장치와, 이를 이용한 구조물 결함 검출 방법 및 그 장치
abstract:
2차원 영상으로부터 3차원 정보를 생성하는 방법 및 그 장치와, 이를 이용한 구조물 결함 검출 방법 및 그 장치가 개시된다. 3차원정보생성장치는 영상에 대해 히스토그램 쉬프팅을 수행하여 경계 영역의 대비(contrast)를 향상시킨 화이트닝 이미지를 생성하고, 화이트닝 이미지에 경계 검출 알고리즘을 적용하여 영상에 존재하는 경계를 검출하여 경계선 이미지를 생성하고, 다양한 방향에서 촬영한 복수의 영상에 대하여 각각 생성한 복수의 경계선 이미지로부터 복수의 특징점을 추출하고, 서로 다른 경계선 이미지에서 각각 추출된 서로 다른 시점의 3개 이상의 특징점들을 매칭하여 영상에 포함된 객체에 대한 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 생성한다.

Disclosed are a method and apparatus for generating 3D information from a 2D image, and a structure defect detection method and apparatus using the same. The 3D information generator performs histogram shifting on the image to generate a whitening image with improved contrast in the border area, and detects the border existing in the image by applying a border detection algorithm to the whitening image to obtain a border image. and extracts a plurality of feature points from a plurality of boundary images respectively generated for a plurality of images taken in various directions, matches three or more feature points from different viewpoints extracted from different boundary images, and includes them in the image. Creates a 3D point cloud for a given object.
claims:
영상에 대해 히스토그램 쉬프팅을 수행하여 경계의 대비(contrast)를 향상시킨 화이트닝 이미지를 생성하는 단계; 상기 화이트닝 이미지에 경계 검출 알고리즘을 적용하여 상기 영상에 존재하는 경계를 검출하여 경계선 이미지를 생성하는 단계; 다양한 방향에서 촬영한 복수의 영상에 대한 복수의 경계선 이미지로부터 복수의 특징점을 추출하는 단계; 및 서로 다른 경계선 이미지에서 각각 추출된 서로 다른 시점의 3개 이상의 특징점들을 매칭하여 영상에 포함된 객체에 대한 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 생성하는 단계;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 기초로 상기 객체에 대한 메쉬 또는 솔리드 형태의 3차원 모델을 생성하는 단계;를 더 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 화이트닝 이미지를 생성하는 단계는, 영상의 각 픽셀의 밝기값에 대한 히스토그램에서 기 정의된 중간밝기값을 기준으로 왼쪽 영역의 픽셀들에 대해 왼쪽으로 히스토그램 쉬프팅하고 오른쪽 영역의 픽셀들에 대해 오른쪽으로 히스토그램 쉬프팅하는 단계;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 화이트닝 이미지를 생성하는 단계는, 영상을 구성하는 픽셀 데이터 중에서 기 정의된 최소컷오프값 이하의 밝기값을 가진 픽셀 또는 기 정의된 최대컷오프값 이상의 밝기값을 가진 픽셀을 제거하여 상기 영상의 데이터 크기를 감소시키는 단계;를 더 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 화이트닝 이미지를 생성하는 단계는, 영상의 히스토그램에서 기 정의된 임계값 이하의 밝기값을 가진 픽셀들을 상기 임계값 초과의 영역에 균일하게 분포시켜 레벨 쉬프팅하는 단계;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 경계선 이미지를 생성하는 단계는, 제1 경계 검출 알고리즘을 적용하여 영상 내 객체의 바깥 방향으로 제1 임시경계선을 검출하는 단계; 제2 경계 검출 알고리즘을 적용하여 상기 영상 내 객체의 안쪽 방향으로 제2 임시경계선을 검출하는 단계; 및 상기 제1 임시경계선과 상기 제2 임시경계선의 사이를 상기 영상 내 객체의 경계선으로 결정하는 단계;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 복수의 특징점을 추출하는 단계는, 렌즈 수차에 의한 왜곡을 해소하기 위하여, 상기 경계선 이미지의 중앙의 기 정의된 일부 영역을 특징점을 추출에 사용하는 단계;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 생성하는 단계는, 서로 다른 시점의 3개 이상의 특징점들을 기초로 임시 포인트 클라우드를 생성하는 단계; 및 상기 서로 다른 시점의 3개 이상의 특징점들과 상기 임시 포인트 클라우드를 함께 이용하여 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 획득하는 단계;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 영상은 구조물의 표면을 촬영한 영상이고, 상기 객체의 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 기초로 상기 객체가 상기 구조물의 표면 아래에 위치하는지를 파악하는 단계;를 더 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 제 1항에 있어서, 상기 영상은 구조물의 표면을 촬영한 영상이고, 상기 객체의 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 기초로 생성한 상기 객체의 3차원 모델을 상기 구조물의 3차원 모델에 중첩하여 표시하는 단계;를 더 포함하는 것을 특징으로 하는 3차원 정보 생성 방법. 영상에 대해 히스토그램 쉬프팅을 수행하여 경계선 영역의 대비(contrast)를 향상시킨 화이트닝 이미지를 생성하는 화이트닝부; 상기 화이트닝 이미지에 경계 검출 알고리즘을 적용하여 상기 영상에 존재하는 객체의 경계를 검출하여 경계선 이미지를 생성하는 경계검출부; 상기 객체를 다양한 방향에서 촬영한 복수의 영상에 대하여 각각 생성한 복수의 경계선 이미지로부터 복수의 특징점을 추출하는 특징점추출부; 및 서로 다른 경계선 이미지에서 각각 추출된 서로 다른 시점의 3개 이상의 특징점들을 매칭하여 상기 객체에 대한 3차원 포인트 클라우드를 생성하는 포인트클라우드생성부;를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 3차원정보생성장치. 제 1항 내지 제 10항 중 어느 한 항에 기재된 방법을 수행하기 위한 컴퓨터 프로그램을 기록한 컴퓨터로 읽을 수 있는 기록매체.

Generating a whitening image in which the contrast of a boundary is improved by performing histogram shifting on the image; generating a border image by detecting a border existing in the image by applying a border detection algorithm to the whitening image; extracting a plurality of feature points from a plurality of boundary line images of a plurality of images photographed in various directions; and generating a 3D point cloud for an object included in an image by matching three or more feature points of different viewpoints extracted from different borderline images. The method of claim 1, further comprising generating a mesh or solid 3D model of the object based on the 3D point cloud. The method of claim 1, wherein the generating of the whitening image comprises shifting the histogram of pixels in the left area to the left based on a predefined median brightness value in the histogram for brightness values of each pixel of the image, and shifting the histogram to the left for pixels in the right area. A method of generating 3D information comprising the steps of shifting the histogram to the right with respect to pixels. The method of claim 1, wherein the generating of the whitening image removes pixels having a brightness value below a predetermined minimum cutoff value or pixels having a brightness value above a predetermined maximum cutoff value from among pixel data constituting the image. 3-dimensional information generation method characterized in that it further comprises; reducing the data size of the image by doing. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the generating of the whitening image comprises uniformly distributing pixels having a brightness value below a predetermined threshold in an image histogram in an area exceeding the threshold and performing level shifting. Three-dimensional information generation method characterized in that. The method of claim 1, wherein the generating of the boundary image comprises: detecting a first temporary boundary in an outward direction of the object in the image by applying a first boundary detection algorithm; detecting a second temporary boundary in an inward direction of an object in the image by applying a second boundary detection algorithm; and determining a boundary between the first temporary boundary and the second temporary boundary as the boundary of the object in the image. The method of claim 1, wherein the extracting of the plurality of feature points comprises using a predefined portion of a central region of the boundary line image to extract feature points in order to eliminate distortion caused by lens aberration. Characterized by a method for generating 3D information. The method of claim 1, wherein the generating of the 3D point cloud comprises: generating a temporary point cloud based on three or more feature points of different viewpoints; and obtaining a 3D point cloud by using the three or more feature points of different viewpoints together with the temporary point cloud. The method of claim 1, wherein the image is an image of the surface of the structure, and the step of determining whether the object is located below the surface of the structure based on a 3D point cloud of the object; characterized in that it further comprises A method for generating 3D information. The method of claim 1, wherein the image is an image obtained by photographing a surface of a structure, and displaying a 3D model of the object generated based on a 3D point cloud of the object by superimposing it on the 3D model of the structure; Three-dimensional information generating method characterized in that it further comprises. a whitening unit that performs histogram shifting on an image to generate a whitening image with improved contrast in a border area; a boundary detection unit generating a boundary image by detecting a boundary of an object existing in the image by applying a boundary detection algorithm to the whitening image; a feature point extraction unit extracting a plurality of feature points from a plurality of boundary line images respectively generated for a plurality of images of the object photographed from various directions; and a point cloud generating unit generating a 3D point cloud for the object by matching three or more feature points of different viewpoints extracted from different boundary line images. A computer-readable recording medium recording a computer program for performing the method according to any one of claims 1 to 10.

title: ANONYMIZING PERSONALLY IDENTIFYING INFORMATION IN IMAGE DATA
abstract: Receiving image data of a location in the form of a video feed, pictures, and/or depth information, as examples, from a client device controlled by a user, and/or other data is described. The received data serves as an input to a model (e.g., an artificial intelligence (AI)-based model such as a machine learning model) configured to generate an electronic representation of the location enriched with spatially localized details about surfaces and contents of the location. The electronic representation can be used for various purposes. The present disclosure provides a systems, methods, and computer programs that resolve several impediments in existing three dimensional image data acquisition and/or visualization systems by anonymizing personally identifying information (PII) in the received image data.
claims: 1 . A non-transitory, machine readable medium storing instructions which, when executed by at least one programmable processor, cause the at least one programmable processor to perform operations comprising: receiving image data from an imaging device; determining that a suspect portion of the image data can or does contain personally identifying information (PII); generating anonymized image data by digitally altering the suspect portion of the image data to substantially remove the PII; and modifying the image data by replacing the suspect portion of the image data with the anonymized image data. 2 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein PII comprises information which is related to an identified or identifiable natural person. 3 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein a suspect portion of the image data that can contain PII comprises types of objects identified in the image data that are known to sometimes include PII, but not always. 4 . The medium of claim 3 , wherein the types of objects comprise mirrors, picture frames, photographs, television or computer monitors, windows, and/or text containing objects. 5 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the PII comprises one or more of an image of a face, a person, an animal, a document listing a name, a document listing an address, an identification card, a calendar, a prescription bottle, a title of a book, a document that includes PII, an image of a landmark, or a license plate. 6 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the imaging device comprises a depth sensor and/or a camera, and the image data comprises depth information from the depth sensor and/or pictures or video from the camera. 7 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein digitally altering the suspect portion of the image data comprises one or more of gaussian blurring, redacting or removing, or replacement of the suspect image data with a generic image from a library or a generic 3D model. 8 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein digitally altering the suspect portion of the image data comprises blurring the suspect image data. 9 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein a degree of digitally altering the suspect portion of the image data varies from a blurring or pixelation to a full redaction or removal of the suspect portion of the image data. 10 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein substantially removing the PII comprises applying one or more digital alterations to the image data that reduce or eliminate an ability of a person or computer software to obtain the PII from the anonymized image data. 11 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein digitally altering the suspect image data is configured to make it impossible for most humans to obtain the PII by visual inspection of images generated from the anonymized image data. 12 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein digitally altering the suspect image data is configured to make it impossible, or require a significant increase in processing power and/or time, for a computer to extract usable PII from the anonymized image data. 13 . The medium of claim 1 , the operations further comprising determining that the suspect portion of the image data does contain PII. 14 . The medium of claim 13 , the determining comprising performing facial recognition on the image data to detect a face, wherein the generating of anonymized image data digitally alters the face. 15 . The medium of claim 13 , the determining comprising performing optical character recognition on the image data to detect characters, wherein the generating of anonymized image data digitally alters the characters. 16 . The medium of claim 1 , the operations further comprising: identifying an object from the image data; determining that the object is a suspect object that can include the PII; and generating the anonymized image data for at least a portion of the suspect object. 17 . The medium of claim 16 , the operations further comprising: identifying a plurality of objects from the image data; and generating anonymized image data for only the suspect object and not generating anonymized image data for any of the plurality of objects not identified as suspect objects. 18 . The medium of claim 17 , wherein generating anonymized image data only for the suspect object comprises anonymizing the PII and potential incidental anonymization of nearby image data including pixels near a boundary of a photo, face, or document; and/or pixels in spaces between and inside text. 19 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the anonymized image data comprises only the PII and does not include other portions of the image data that do not contain the PII. 20 . The medium of claim 1 , the operations further comprising: storing the suspect portion of the image data in temporary computer memory; performing the generation of the anonymized image data from the suspect portion without storing the suspect portion in permanent computer memory; and transferring the anonymized image data to permanent computer memory. 21 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the generating of the anonymized image data is performed at the imaging device. 22 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the determining is performed in a first part at the imaging device and in a second part at a server. 23 . The medium of claim 22 , wherein the first part includes performing facial recognition and the second part includes performing object identification. 24 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the suspect portion is anonymized within a two dimensional (2D) bounding box, a three dimensional (3D) bounding box, a 2D polygon, a 3D polygon, or a semantic segmentation. 25 . The medium of claim 1 , wherein the image data is 3D. 26 . The medium of claim 25 , wherein determining that a suspect portion of the image data can or does contain personally identifying information (PII) comprises performing object detection and mask prediction on the image data using a neural network. 27 . The medium of claim 26 , wherein the neural network is a mask region based convolutional neural network (R-CNN). 28 . The medium of claim 26 , wherein generating anonymized image data by digitally altering the suspect portion of the image data to substantially remove the PII, and modifying the image data by replacing the suspect portion of the image data with the anonymized image data comprises: extracting binary masks from neural network outputs and saving the binary masks to a video file; saving a metadata file that stores indices of frames of the image data in which PII was detected; combining the binary masks with the image data based on the indices; and applying a blur to frames of the image data that contain PII based on the masks. 29 . The medium of claim 1 , the operations further comprising generating a 2D image or 3D model based at least on the anonymized image data. 30 . The medium of claim 1 , the operations further comprising generating, with a machine learning model, an inventory list based at least on the anonymized image data.

title: UNDERGROUND PIPELINE INTEGRITY EVALUATION SYSTEM AND METHOD; 一种地下管道完整性评价系统及方法
abstract:
本发明实施例公开了一种地下管道完整性评价系统及方法，所述系统包括：三维模型构建模块，用于根据针对炼厂设备、地上标志物以及与炼厂设备连接的管道实地勘测结果，在三维可视化平台中建立关于炼厂设备、地上标志物以及与炼厂设备连接的管道的三维模型；管线信息获取模块，用于根据建立的三维模型获取管线信息；管道完整性评价模块，用于基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行管道基础数据管理、检测数据管理、缺陷数据管理和缺陷评价及维修决策管理。本发明实施例通过与埋地管道三维可视化平台交互，实现埋地管道，特别是炼厂内地下管道管体缺陷的分析评价和维修决策。

The embodiment of the present invention discloses an underground pipeline integrity evaluation system and method, the system comprising: a three-dimensional model construction module, which is used to establish a three-dimensional model of refinery equipment, ground markers and pipelines connected to refinery equipment in a three-dimensional visualization platform based on field survey results of refinery equipment, ground markers and pipelines connected to refinery equipment; a pipeline information acquisition module, which is used to obtain pipeline information based on the established three-dimensional model; a pipeline integrity evaluation module, which is used to perform pipeline basic data management, detection data management, defect data management, defect evaluation and maintenance decision management on the pipeline based on interaction with the established three-dimensional model. The embodiment of the present invention realizes analysis and evaluation of defects in the buried pipeline, especially underground pipelines in refineries, and maintenance decisions by interacting with the buried pipeline three-dimensional visualization platform.
claims:
1 . 一种地下管道完整性评价系统，其特征在于，包括： 三维模型构建模块，用于根据针对炼厂设备、地上标志物以及与炼厂设备连接的管道实地勘测结果，在三维可视化平台中建立关于炼厂设备、地上标志物以及与炼厂设备连接的管道的三维模型； 管线信息获取模块，用于根据建立的三维模型获取管线信息； 管道完整性评价模块，用于基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行管道基础数据管理、检测数据管理、缺陷数据管理和缺陷评价及维修决策管理； 管道完整性评价模块在基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行缺陷数据管理时， 具体用于： 对检测管道所检出的缺陷，按照不同缺陷类型分类进行缺陷信息管理，与三维模型交互，实现检测管道缺陷信息的增、查、删、改； 通过缺陷点编号实现缺陷点在三维模型中的高亮定位，并通过下拉列表，选择年份、装置、管道编号、检测工程，查看该检测工程下所有的缺陷点及缺陷信息； 管道完整性评价模块在三维模型上新增缺陷时，具体采用如下两种方式实现： A、对于单个的缺陷，在已知缺陷定位的前提下，在管道的三维模型上通过在检测管道上的标志物进行标尺测量，直接添加缺陷点位置，之后录入缺陷数据； B、对于批量缺陷，通过下载缺陷信息模板并编辑缺陷信息实现批量缺陷数据的导入， 缺陷数据导入成功后，针对每一条缺陷数据人工录入缺陷定位，并将新增缺陷在三维模型中的关联展示；或在列表中选定要添加定位的缺陷，通过缺陷定位的添加按钮，在三维管道上添加缺陷，并将缺陷信息自动更新到三维缺陷点上； 管道完整性评价模块在三维模型上删除缺陷时，具体用于采用如下三种方式实现： A、删除缺陷点位置保留缺陷数据，再次添加相同缺陷编号的缺陷位置后，自动更新缺陷数据； B、删除缺陷数据而保留三维缺陷点位置，再次点击三维缺陷点新增信息后，自动关联到三维缺陷点上； C、将缺陷数据和三维模型管道上的缺陷位置同时删除。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的地下管道完整性评价系统，其特征在于，管道完整性评价模块在基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行检测数据管理时，具体用于： 在管线三维模型上，通过检测标志物，由人工定位在待检测管线上点选确定检测管道的检测范围； 根据检测管道所在的管线自动生成检测管道编号； 根据检测管道编号，实现与三维模型中检测管道的高亮定位； 对检测管道的信息进行维护和修改。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的地下管道完整性评价系统，其特征在于，管道完整性评价模块在基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行检测数据管理时，具体用于： 在三维模型新增的检测管道下新建检测工程，对检测工程及其相关信息进行维护管理； 通过检测管道编号，查看对应检测管道下的所有检测工程列表。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的地下管道完整性评价系统，其特征在于，管道完整性评价模块 在基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行缺陷评价及维修决策管理时，具体用于： 针对信息缺失或无法量化尺寸及类型的缺陷，通过调用信号图，通过专家经验对单一缺陷进行过人工评价并给出维修建议； 其中，单一缺陷人工评价是在人工评价功能开启后，选择要评价的缺陷，该缺陷所在管道对应的检测信号图自动与三维模型中管道的起终点对应，以直接定位该缺陷点的信号， 通过分析缺陷信号对缺陷直接给出严重程度评价及维修建议； 其中，批量人工评价是通过选择炼厂设备，管道编号，检测工程，缺陷类型后，对检测工程下的某一类缺陷点，直接进行批量评价和维修决策。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的地下管道完整性评价系统，其特征在于，管道完整性评价模块在基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行缺陷评价及维修决策管理时，具体用于： 针对定量的缺陷，通过检测获得缺陷尺寸和缺陷类型的批量缺陷，对于不同的缺陷类型采用的缺陷评价方式不同； 其中，单一缺陷自动评价是针对缺陷类型已知的缺陷点，选择需要评价的缺陷点，选择评价方法，进行缺陷点自动评价； 其中，批量缺陷自动评价是通过选择装置、管道编号、检测工程、缺陷类型后，对需要评价的缺陷点，选择评价方法、输入评价所需信息后通过系统内置评价算法，批量评价相应类型的缺陷。 6 .根据权利要求1所述的地下管道完整性评价系统，其特征在于，管道完整性评价模块在基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行管道基础数据管理时，具体用于： 基于所述三维模型以及所述管线信息，从三维可视化平台中获取管道所在管线的基本信息，包括管径、壁厚、管材、输送介质、连接设备信息的增、查、删、改。 7 . 一种基于如权利要求1〜6任一项所述的地下管道完整性评价系统的地下管道完整性评价方法，其特征在于，包括： 根据针对炼厂设备、地上标志物以及与炼厂设备连接的管道实地勘测结果，在三维可视化平台中建立关于炼厂设备、地上标志物以及与炼厂设备连接的管道的三维模型； 根据建立的三维模型获取管线信息； 基于与建立的三维模型的交互，对管道进行管道基础数据管理、检测数据管理、缺陷数据管理和缺陷评价及维修决策管理； 管道完整性评价模块在基于与建立的三维模型的交互,对管道进行缺陷数据管理时， 具体用于： 对检测管道所检出的缺陷，按照不同缺陷类型分类进行缺陷信息管理，与三维模型交互，实现检测管道缺陷信息的增、查、删、改； 通过缺陷点编号实现缺陷点在三维模型中的高亮定位,并通过下拉列表，选择年份、装置、管道编号、检测工程,查看该检测工程下所有的缺陷点及缺陷信息； 管道完整性评价模块在三维模型上新增缺陷时，具体采用如下两种方式实现： A、对于单个的缺陷，在已知缺陷定位的前提下，在管道的三维模型上通过在检测管道上的标志物进行标尺测量，直接添加缺陷点位置，之后录入缺陷数据； B、对于批量缺陷，通过下载缺陷信息模板并编辑缺陷信息实现批量缺陷数据的导入， 缺陷数据导入成功后，针对每一条缺陷数据人工录入缺陷定位,并将新增缺陷在三维模型 中的关联展示；或在列表中选定要添加定位的缺陷,通过缺陷定位的添加按钮，在三维管道上添加缺陷，并将缺陷信息自动更新到三维缺陷点上； 管道完整性评价模块在三维模型上删除缺陷时，具体用于采用如下三种方式实现： A、删除缺陷点位置保留缺陷数据，再次添加相同缺陷编号的缺陷位置后，自动更新缺陷数据； B、删除缺陷数据而保留三维缺陷点位置，再次点击三维缺陷点新增信息后，自动关联到三维缺陷点上； C、将缺陷数据和三维模型管道上的缺陷位置同时删除。

1 . An underground pipeline integrity evaluation system, characterized in that it includes: a three-dimensional model construction module, which is used to establish a three-dimensional model of refinery equipment, ground markers and pipelines connected to refinery equipment in a three-dimensional visualization platform based on the field survey results of refinery equipment, ground markers and pipelines connected to refinery equipment; a pipeline information acquisition module, which is used to obtain pipeline information based on the established three-dimensional model; a pipeline integrity evaluation module, which is used to perform pipeline basic data management, detection data management, defect data management and defect evaluation and maintenance decision management for the pipeline based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model; when the pipeline integrity evaluation module performs defect data management for the pipeline based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, it is specifically used to: manage defect information of defects detected by the detection pipeline according to different defect types, interact with the three-dimensional model, and realize the addition, query, deletion and modification of the detection pipeline defect information; highlight the defect point in the three-dimensional model by numbering the defect point, and select the year, device, pipeline number, and detection project through the drop-down list to view all defect points and defect information under the detection project; When the pipeline integrity assessment module adds defects to the 3D model, it is implemented in the following two ways: A. For a single defect, under the premise of knowing the defect location, the defect point location is directly added on the three-dimensional model of the pipeline by measuring the markers on the inspection pipeline, and then the defect data is entered; B. For batch defects, batch defect data can be imported by downloading defect information templates and editing defect information. After the defect data is successfully imported, the defect location is manually entered for each defect data, and the newly added defects are displayed in the 3D model; or the defects to be added are selected in the list, and the defect location is added to the 3D pipeline through the Add button of the defect location, and the defect information is automatically updated to the 3D defect point; When the pipeline integrity evaluation module deletes defects on the 3D model, it is specifically used in the following three ways: A. Delete the defect point location to keep the defect data. After adding the defect location with the same defect number again, the defect data will be automatically updated. B. Delete the defect data and keep the 3D defect point position. Click the 3D defect point again to add new information, and it will be automatically associated with the 3D defect point. C. Delete the defect data and the defect location on the 3D model pipeline at the same time. 2 .The underground pipeline integrity evaluation system according to claim 1 is characterized in that, when the pipeline integrity evaluation module manages the pipeline detection data based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, it is specifically used to: On the three-dimensional model of the pipeline, by detecting markers, manually locate and click on the pipeline to be detected to determine the detection range of the detection pipeline; Automatically generate the detection pipeline number according to the pipeline where the detection pipeline is located; Based on the detection pipeline number, realize the highlighted positioning of the detection pipeline in the three-dimensional model; Maintain and modify the information of the detection pipeline. 3 .The underground pipeline integrity evaluation system according to claim 1 is characterized in that, when the pipeline integrity evaluation module manages the pipeline inspection data based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, it is specifically used to: create a new inspection project under the newly added inspection pipeline in the three-dimensional model, and maintain and manage the inspection project and its related information; view the list of all inspection projects under the corresponding inspection pipeline through the inspection pipeline number. 4 . The underground pipeline integrity evaluation system according to claim 1 is characterized in that the pipeline integrity evaluation module When evaluating defects and managing maintenance decisions for pipelines based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, it is specifically used for: For defects with missing information or whose size and type cannot be quantified, the signal graph is called to conduct manual evaluation of single defects based on expert experience and provide maintenance suggestions; Among them, the manual evaluation of a single defect is to select the defect to be evaluated after the manual evaluation function is turned on. The detection signal graph corresponding to the pipeline where the defect is located is automatically corresponded to the starting and ending points of the pipeline in the three-dimensional model to directly locate the signal of the defect point, and the severity evaluation and maintenance suggestions are directly given to the defects by analyzing the defect signals; Among them, batch manual evaluation is to directly conduct batch evaluation and maintenance decisions on a certain type of defect points under the inspection project after selecting the refinery equipment, pipeline number, inspection project, and defect type. 5 .The underground pipeline integrity evaluation system according to claim 1 is characterized in that the pipeline integrity evaluation module, when performing defect evaluation and maintenance decision management on the pipeline based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, is specifically used for: For quantitative defects, batch defects of defect size and defect type are obtained by detection, and different defect evaluation methods are adopted for different defect types; Among them, the automatic evaluation of single defects is to select the defect points that need to be evaluated, select the evaluation method, and automatically evaluate the defect points for the defect points whose defect types are known; Among them, the automatic evaluation of batch defects is to select the device, pipeline number, inspection project, defect type, select the evaluation method for the defect points that need to be evaluated, input the information required for evaluation, and then evaluate the corresponding types of defects in batches through the system's built-in evaluation algorithm. 6 .The underground pipeline integrity evaluation system according to claim 1 is characterized in that when the pipeline integrity evaluation module manages the pipeline basic data based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, it is specifically used to: Based on the three-dimensional model and the pipeline information, obtain the basic information of the pipeline where the pipeline is located from the three-dimensional visualization platform, including the addition, query, deletion and modification of the pipe diameter, wall thickness, pipe material, conveying medium and connection equipment information. 7 . An underground pipeline integrity evaluation method based on the underground pipeline integrity evaluation system according to any one of claims 1 to 6, characterized in that it comprises: establishing a three-dimensional model of the refinery equipment, the ground markers and the pipeline connected to the refinery equipment in a three-dimensional visualization platform according to the field survey results of the refinery equipment, the ground markers and the pipeline connected to the refinery equipment; acquiring pipeline information according to the established three-dimensional model; performing pipeline basic data management, detection data management, defect data management and defect evaluation and maintenance decision management on the pipeline based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model; when the pipeline integrity evaluation module performs defect data management on the pipeline based on the interaction with the established three-dimensional model, it is specifically used to: manage defect information of the defects detected by the detection pipeline according to different defect types, interact with the three-dimensional model, and realize the addition, query, deletion and modification of the detection pipeline defect information; realize the highlighting of the defect point in the three-dimensional model by numbering the defect point, and select the year, device, pipeline number, and detection project through the drop-down list to view all defect points and defect information under the detection project; When the pipeline integrity evaluation module adds a new defect to the three-dimensional model, it is specifically implemented in the following two ways: A. For a single defect, under the premise of knowing the defect location, the defect point location is directly added on the three-dimensional model of the pipeline by measuring the markers on the inspection pipeline, and then the defect data is entered; B. For batch defects, batch defect data can be imported by downloading defect information templates and editing defect information. After the defect data is successfully imported, the defect location is manually entered for each defect data, and the newly added defects are added to the 3D model. or select the defect to be located in the list, click the Add button of Defect Location to add the defect to the 3D pipeline, and automatically update the defect information to the 3D defect point; When the pipeline integrity assessment module deletes defects on the 3D model, it is specifically used in the following three ways: A. Delete the defect point location to keep the defect data. After adding the defect location with the same defect number again, the defect data will be automatically updated. B. Delete the defect data and keep the 3D defect point position. Click the 3D defect point again to add new information, and it will be automatically associated with the 3D defect point. C. Delete the defect data and the defect location on the 3D model pipeline at the same time.

technical_means: 画像生成・再構成
method_name: 画像生成・再構成
llm_reviewer_comment_short: 製造物や設備の欠陥・異常検出を画像処理で扱っており、専門家確認候補として強い。
llm_reviewer_comment_detail: 課題文脈は欠陥・異常検出の目的を比較的よく表している。解決手段文脈は処理手順やモデル構成を読み取れる。技術手段は関連するが一般語・抽象語が中心である。製造欠陥検出・画像検査への対応が明確で、代表特許候補として説明しやすい。

title: A DEFECT IDENTIFICATION METHOD FOR SEALING SURFACE ERROR EVALUATION BASED ON OPTICAL MEASUREMENT POINT CLOUD; 一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法
abstract:
本发明涉及密封面测量缺陷识别技术领域，具体公开了一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法。该方法包括：1、采集主泵法兰密封面点云数据；2、对点云数据进行预处理；5、根据主泵法兰密封面的点云数据，进行缺陷识别；5.1、建立误差色谱图；5.2、利用误差色谱的颜色变换梯度，获得梯度变换超过阈值的像素点所围城的封闭区域，实现对密封面缺陷的自动识别。该方法克服来现有测量方法无法实现原位、高精度、高效率自动化测量的缺陷；同时，基于测量原始点云数据自动评估零件2D尺寸误差、圆度/平面度误差，识别表面缺陷，简化了数据处理和误差评估的过程，提升了效率和精度，克服来传统方法获取深度信息困难的缺点。

The invention relates to the technical field of sealing surface measurement defect identification, and specifically discloses a sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method based on an optical measurement point cloud. The method includes: 1. Collecting point cloud data of the sealing surface of the flange of the main pump; 2. Preprocessing the point cloud data; 5. Identifying defects according to the point cloud data of the sealing surface of the flange of the main pump; 5.1. Establishing an error chromatogram Fig. 5.2. Use the color transformation gradient of the error spectrum to obtain the enclosed area surrounded by the pixels whose gradient transformation exceeds the threshold, and realize the automatic identification of sealing surface defects. This method overcomes the defect that the existing measurement methods cannot achieve in-situ, high-precision, and high-efficiency automatic measurement; at the same time, based on the measurement original point cloud data, the 2D size error, roundness/flatness error of the part are automatically evaluated, surface defects are identified, and the simplification The process of data processing and error evaluation is improved, the efficiency and accuracy are improved, and the shortcomings of traditional methods that are difficult to obtain depth information are overcome.
claims:
1 .一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法，其特征在于：该方法具体包括 如下步骤： 步骤1、采集主泵法兰密封面点云数据； 步骤2、对点云数据进行预处理； 步骤2.1、对完整的三维点云进行精简处理； 步骤2.2、对点云数据中对孤立点进行剔除； 步骤2.3、将点云与设计模型相匹配； 步骤4.2、测定点云数据的平面度误差； 步骤4.2.1、以环形圆心为中心点生成圆形框选区域，并自动框选密封面平面点云； 步骤4.2.2、利用最小二乘法拟合理想平面； 步骤4.2.3、根据包容原则，测定点云数据的平面度误差； 步骤5、根据主泵法兰密封面的点云数据，进行缺陷识别； 步骤5.1、建立误差色谱图； 步骤5.2、利用误差色谱的颜色变换梯度，获得梯度变换超过阈值的像素点所围成的封 闭区域，实现对密封面缺陷的自动识别； 根据误差色谱图，选取存在缺陷的大致区域，并利用图像分割算法，计算获得误差色谱 图的颜色变换梯度，当颜色变换梯度超过设定的阈值则认为该密封面表面产生突变，并记 录该像素点，将梯度变化超出阈值的像素点所围成的封闭区域识别为表面缺陷，从而实现 对密封面缺陷的自动识别。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法，其特征 在于:该方法还包括进行2D尺寸误差计算的步骤3为： 在设计模型坐标系下生成贯穿对象截面，并获取相应对2D截面点云，并测量主泵法兰 密封面点云在该2D截面上对深度、直径对实际尺寸，并与设计模型所对应对尺寸进行比较， 自动判断是否超过公差范围。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法，其特征 在于:该方法还包括进行圆度误差计算的步骤4.1为： 步骤4.1、测定点云数据的圆度误差； 步骤4.1.1、建立水平截面截取圆周截面点云； 步骤4.1.2、利用最小二乘法拟合理想圆； 步骤4.1.3、根据包容原则，测定点云数据对圆度误差。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法，其特征 在于:所述的步骤5.1中建立误差色谱图的具体步骤为： 将主泵法兰密封面的测试点云与设计模型匹配对齐后，计算每个点到设计模型的最近 距离，并通过颜色来表示距离的大小，形成误差色谱图。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法，其特征 在于:所述的步骤1采集主泵法兰密封面点云数据的具体过程包括： 利用六自由度工业机器人夹持面阵扫描仪，并保证面阵扫描仪投射的光栅能够覆盖所 测量的主泵法兰密封面表面；机器人带动扫描仪安装预先设定的轨迹运动，对主泵法兰密 封面待测区域进行扫描测量，并获取主泵法兰密封面待测区域完整的三维点云数据。 6 .根据权利要求1所述的一种光学测量点云的密封面误差评估缺陷识别方法，其特征 在于:所述的步骤2具体包括： 步骤2.1、对完整的三维点云进行精简处理； 对机器人带动光栅面阵扫描仪初始测量获得的大规模测量点云进行均匀采样，对点云 数据进行精简，提升数据处理效率； 步骤2.2、对点云数据中对孤立点进行剔除； 对测量点云数据中对孤立点和噪音点进行删除； 步骤2.3、将点云与设计模型相匹配； 将测量点云与设计模型匹配对齐至同一坐标系下。

1 . A sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method of optical measurement point cloud, characterized in that: the method specifically comprises the following steps: Step 1, collecting point cloud data of the sealing surface of the main pump flange; Step 2, pre-predicting the point cloud data processing; Step 2.1, simplify the complete 3D point cloud; Step 2.2, remove outliers from the point cloud data; Step 2.3, match the point cloud with the design model; Step 4.2, measure the plane of the point cloud data degree error; Step 4.2.1, generate a circular frame selection area with the center of the ring as the center point, and automatically frame the point cloud of the sealing surface plane; Step 4.2.2, use the least squares method to fit the ideal plane; Step 4.2.3, According to the tolerance principle, measure the flatness error of the point cloud data; Step 5. Identify the defects according to the point cloud data of the sealing surface of the flange of the main pump; Step 5.1, Establish an error chromatogram; Step 5.2, Use the color transformation gradient of the error chromatogram , obtain the enclosed area enclosed by the pixels whose gradient transformation exceeds the threshold, and realize the automatic identification of sealing surface defects; According to the error chromatogram, select the approximate area with defects, and use the image segmentation algorithm to calculate the color of the error chromatogram. Transformation gradient, when the color transformation gradient exceeds the set threshold, it is considered that the surface of the sealing surface has a sudden change, and the pixel point is recorded, and the enclosed area surrounded by the pixel points whose gradient changes exceed the threshold value are identified as surface defects, so as to realize the sealing effect. Automatic recognition of surface defects. 2 . the sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method of a kind of optical measurement point cloud according to claim 1, is characterized in that: this method also comprises the step 3 of carrying out 2D size error calculation: under the design model coordinate system, generate through object Section, and obtain the corresponding 2D section point cloud, and measure the point cloud of the main pump flange sealing surface on the depth, diameter and actual size of the 2D section, and compare it with the corresponding size of the design model, and automatically determine whether it exceeds the tolerance. scope. 3 . the sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method of a kind of optical measurement point cloud according to claim 1, is characterized in that: this method also comprises that the step 4.1 of carrying out roundness error calculation is: Step 4.1, measure the circle of point cloud data Step 4.1.1. Establish a horizontal section to intercept the point cloud of the circular section. Step 4.1.2. Use the least squares method to fit an ideal circle. Step 4.1.3. Determine the roundness error of the point cloud data according to the inclusive principle. 4 . the sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method of a kind of optical measurement point cloud according to claim 1, is characterized in that: the concrete steps of establishing error chromatogram in described step 5.1 are: After the test point cloud is matched and aligned with the design model, the closest distance from each point to the design model is calculated, and the distance is represented by color to form an error chromatogram. 5 . the sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method of a kind of optical measurement point cloud according to claim 1, is characterized in that: the concrete process that described step 1 collects main pump flange sealing surface point cloud data comprises: Utilize six free The industrial robot clamps the area array scanner, and ensures that the grating projected by the area array scanner can cover the measured surface of the main pump flange sealing surface; the robot drives the scanner to install the preset trajectory movement to seal the main pump flange. Scan and measure the area to be measured, and obtain complete 3D point cloud data of the area to be measured on the sealing surface of the main pump flange. 6 . the sealing surface error evaluation defect identification method of a kind of optical measurement point cloud according to claim 1, is characterized in that: described step 2 specifically comprises: Step 2.1, carries out streamlining processing to complete three-dimensional point cloud; Drive the large-scale measurement point cloud obtained by the initial measurement of the raster area array scanner to perform uniform sampling, simplify the point cloud data, and improve the data processing efficiency; Step 2.2. Eliminate isolated points in the point cloud data; Measure the point cloud data Delete isolated points and noise points in step 2.3, match the point cloud with the design model; align the measurement point cloud with the design model to the same coordinate system.

title: A PIPE NETWORK MANAGEMENT METHOD AND SYSTEM BASED ON BIG DATA ANALYSIS; 一种基于大数据分析的管网管理方法及系统
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于大数据分析的管网管理方法及系统，属于互联网服务技术领域。其中，该方法包括：获取管网和管段的测绘数据、排查数据、检测数据和修复数据，基于测绘数据建立管网模型，将排查数据、检测数据和修复数据都挂接到管网模型上。对排查出现问题的管点和管段进行检测，对检测得到的视频结果进行自动判读和缺陷等级评定。实现了自动化的数据校验复核、智能化的数据挂接和图形化的结果展示，保障管网管理的时效性和规范性。

The invention relates to a pipe network management method and system based on big data analysis, and belongs to the technical field of Internet services. Among them, the method includes: obtaining surveying and mapping data, inspection data, detection data and repair data of the pipeline network and pipe sections, establishing a pipeline network model based on the surveying and mapping data, and linking the inspection data, inspection data and repair data to the pipeline network model. Detect pipe points and pipe sections where problems arise, and automatically interpret and evaluate defect levels on the video results obtained. It realizes automated data verification and review, intelligent data hooking and graphical result display, ensuring the timeliness and standardization of pipeline network management.

title: AUTOMATIC DETECTION METHOD OF CONCRETE STRUCTURE SURFACE DEFECTS BASED ON COMPUTER VISION; 基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法
abstract:
本发明属于计算机视觉技术领域，具体涉及一种基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，包括对视频数据进行时间轴上采样获取图像，再将图像输入深度卷积神经网络模型获取缺陷的位置、缺陷的类别以及缺陷的分割效果。在实际的混凝土结构检测中，本发明的方法基于深度学习框架下的视频图像识别技术，从根本上解决了以往计算机视觉方法中存在的误检率高、通用性差等实际问题；从视频图像数据的处理和最终结果的输出，具有自动化程度高、实时性好、准确率高、通用性好、便于后期升级维护等优点。

The invention belongs to the technical field of computer vision, and specifically relates to a computer vision-based automatic detection method for surface defects of concrete structures, which includes sampling video data on a time axis to obtain images, and then inputting the images into a deep convolutional neural network model to obtain the position of the defect , Defect category and defect segmentation effect. In the actual concrete structure inspection, the method of the present invention is based on the video image recognition technology under the deep learning framework, and fundamentally solves the actual problems of high false detection rate and poor versatility in the previous computer vision methods; from the video image data The processing and the output of the final result have the advantages of high automation, good real-time performance, high accuracy, good versatility, and ease of later upgrade and maintenance.
claims:
1. 一种基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法,其特征在于:对视频数 据进行时间轴上采样获取图像，图像输入深度卷积神经网络模型获取缺陷的位置、缺陷的 类别以及缺陷的分割效果。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述深度卷积神经网络模型包括： 特征提取模块，用于提取图像特征； 缺陷位置生成模块，用于根据图像特征提取出图像中的疑似缺陷目标区域； 缺陷区域位置检测模块，用于获取疑似缺陷目标区域中缺陷在图像中的精确坐标信 息； 缺陷区域分类模块，用于确定疑似缺陷目标区域中缺陷的类别； 缺陷区域分割模块，用于对疑似缺陷目标区域中的缺陷进行语义分割。 3. 根据权利要求2所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述特征提取模块包括ResNet50网络模块，用于提取图像的特征向量。 4. 根据权利要求3所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述缺陷位置生成模块包括感兴趣区域提取模块，将图像的特征向量输入感兴趣 区域提取模块，生成疑似缺陷目标区域的目标框，提取目标框对应的目标区域特征向量，将 所有目标区域特征向量调整到统一的维度;生成目标存在置信度的概率值，并将概率值按 照大小顺序排序，选取概率值大于预设值的目标区域特征向量，作为缺陷区域位置检测模 块、缺陷区域分类模块、缺陷区域分割模块的输入。 5. 根据权利要求4所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述缺陷区域位置检测模块，将目标区域特征向量输入到一线性回归器中计算误 差并进行反向传播，最终得到缺陷所在区域的最小外接矩形。 6. 根据权利要求4所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于：所述缺陷区域分类模块，将目标区域特征向量输入到一全连接层并传输给Soft Max激活层，得到疑似缺陷目标区域对应于各个类别的概率预测向量。 7. 根据权利要求4所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述缺陷区域分割模块，将目标区域特征向量输入到一 Unet网络模块中对疑似缺 陷目标区域中的缺陷进行语义分割。 8. 根据权利要求2-7任一所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方 法，其特征在于:所述深度卷积神经网络模型的训练过程如下： S10、准备训练数据； S20、通过I mageNet数据集训练ResNet50网络模块； S30、训练感兴趣区域提取模块； S40、训练缺陷区域位置检测模块、缺陷区域分类模块和缺陷区域分割模块； S50、调整学习率，然后重复执行S30、S4 0两个步骤，直到设定的损失函数数值收敛到设 定的误差值以下。 9. 根据权利要求8所述的基于计算机视觉的混凝土结构表面缺陷自动检测方法，其特 征在于:所述准备训练数据包括对缺陷的训练数据进行数据增强，模拟生成出各种环境下 的混凝土表面缺陷的成像效果图像。

title: IMAGE PROCESSING METHOD, DEVICE, TRAIN AND EQUIPMENT; 图像处理方法、装置、列车和设备
abstract:
本公开提供了一种图像处理方法、装置、列车和设备，可以应用于图像处理技术领域，该方法包括：响应于图像处理指令，获取受电弓在异常工作状态下的受电弓运行图像，其中，异常工作状态包括异常环境状态和/或受电弓异常状态；利用目标图像分割网络对受电弓运行图像进行分割处理，得到初始分割图像；基于像素面积判定规则对初始分割图像进行像素判定，得到判定结果；在判定结果表征初始分割图像满足像素面积判定规则的情况下，对初始分割图像进行连通连通区域分析处理，得到分析结果；在分析结果表征初始分割图像的连通区域满足预设区域数量阈值的情况下，将初始分割图像确定为用于异常检测的目标分割图像。

The present disclosure provides an image processing method, an apparatus, a train and equipment, which can be applied to the field of image processing technology. The method comprises: in response to an image processing instruction, obtaining a pantograph operation image of a pantograph in an abnormal working state, wherein the abnormal working state comprises an abnormal environmental state and/or an abnormal pantograph state; performing segmentation processing on the pantograph operation image using a target image segmentation network to obtain an initial segmented image; performing pixel determination on the initial segmented image based on a pixel area determination rule to obtain a determination result; when the determination result indicates that the initial segmented image satisfies the pixel area determination rule, performing connected region analysis processing on the initial segmented image to obtain an analysis result; when the analysis result indicates that the connected region of the initial segmented image satisfies a preset region quantity threshold, determining the initial segmented image as a target segmented image for abnormality detection.
claims:
1. 一种用于受电弓异常检测的图像处理方法，包括： 响应于图像处理指令，获取受电弓在异常工作状态下的受电弓运行图像，其中，所述异常工作状态包括异常环境状态和/或受电弓异常状态； 利用目标图像分割网络对所述受电弓运行图像进行分割处理，得到初始分割图像； 基于像素面积判定规则对所述初始分割图像进行像素判定，得到判定结果； 在所述判定结果表征所述初始分割图像满足所述像素面积判定规则的情况下，对所述初始分割图像进行连通区域分析处理，得到分析结果； 在所述分析结果表征所述初始分割图像的连通区域满足预设区域数量阈值的情况下， 将所述初始分割图像确定为用于异常检测的目标分割图像。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其中，获取受电弓在异常工作状态下的受电弓运行图像，包括： 在所述异常工作状态为所述异常环境状态的情况下，利用环境模拟装置在所述受电弓处施加异常工况环境； 采集所述受电弓工作在所述异常工况环境下的第一图像，并将所述第一图像作为所述受电弓运行图像。 3 .根据权利要求2所述的方法，其中，利用环境模拟装置在所述受电弓处施加异常工况环境，包括： 利用喷淋装置对所述受电弓处进行喷淋处理，以模拟雨天环境；和/或利用烟雾装置对所述受电弓处进行喷雾处理，以模拟雾霾环境；和/或利用流场模拟装置对所述受电弓处进行吹风处理，以模拟风暴环境；和/或利用背景模拟装置模拟所述受电弓的工作背景环境。 4 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其中，获取受电弓在异常工作状态下的受电弓运行图像，包括： 在所述异常工作状态为所述受电弓异常状态的情况下，对所述受电弓的目标组件进行调整处理，得到异常受电弓； 采集所述异常受电弓工作时的第二图像，并将所述第二图像作为所述受电弓运行图像。 5 .根据权利要求4所述的方法，其中，对所述受电弓的目标组件进行调整处理，得到异常受电弓，包括： 对第一目标组件进行替换或拆解处理，得到所述异常受电弓，其中，所述第一目标组件包括弓角和弓头中的至少一个;和/或对第二目标组件的工作状态进行调整，得到所述异常受电弓，其中，所述第二目标组件包括受电弓升降系统。 6 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其中，所述目标图像分割网络是通过如下方式训练的： 获取图像训练集，其中，所述图像训练集包括多个受电弓运行样本图像和与每个所述受电弓运行样本图像对应的标签图像，所述标签图像包括受电弓样本的像素标识； 将所述受电弓运行样本图像输入初始图像分割网络，输出融合图像，其中，所述初始图像分割网络是根据视觉自监督模型和特征金字塔网络生成的； 将所述融合图像和与所述融合图像对应的标签图像输入至目标损失函数，输出损失结 果； 根据所述损失结果迭代地调整所述初始图像分割网络的网络参数，得到经训练的所述目标图像分割网络。 7 .根据权利要求6所述的方法，其中，将所述受电弓运行样本图像输入初始图像分割网络，输出融合图像，包括： 利用所述视觉自监督模型处理所述受电弓运行样本图像，得到第一图像特征； 利用第一反卷积层处理所述第一图像特征，得到放大后的第二图像特征； 利用第二反卷积层处理所述第一图像特征，得到放大后的第三图像特征； 利用恒等映射网络处理所述第一图像特征进行，得到第四图像特征； 利用池化层处理所述第一图像特征，得到缩小后的第五图像特征，其中，所述特征金字塔网络包括所述第一反卷积层、所述第二反卷积层、所述恒等映射网络和所述池化层； 对所述第二图像特征、所述第三图像特征、所述第四图像特征和所述第五图像特征进行特征融合处理，得到所述融合图像，其中，所述融合图像中对所述受电弓样本的每个像素进行了标记。 8 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其中，基于像素面积判定规则对所述初始分割图像进行像素判定，得到判定结果，包括： 计算所述初始分割图像中所述受电弓的像素的像素数量； 在所述像素数量满足第一数量区间的情况下，生成第一判定结果，其中，所述第一判定结果表征所述初始分割图像满足所述像素面积判定规则； 在所述像素数量不满足所述第一数量区间的情况下，生成第二判定结果，其中，所述判定结果包括所述第一判定结果或所述第二判定结果。 9 .根据权利要求1所述的方法，其中，所述初始分割图像包括弓头区域、支撑杆区域和底座区域，所述预设区域数量阈值包括第二数量区间、第三数量区间和第四数量区间； 其中，对所述初始分割图像进行连通区域分析处理，得到分析结果，包括： 在所述弓头区域内的部件数量满足所述第二数量区间的情况下，生成第一分析结果； 在所述支撑杆区域内的部件数量满足所述第三数量区间的情况下，生成第二分析结果； 在所述底座区域内的部件数量满足所述第四数量区间的情况下，生成第三分析结果； 根据所述第一分析结果、所述第二分析结果和所述第三分析结果，生成所述分析结果。 10 . 一种用于受电弓异常检测的图像处理装置，包括： 获取模块，用于响应于图像处理指令，获取受电弓在异常工作状态下的受电弓运行图像，其中，所述异常工作状态包括异常环境状态和/或受电弓异常状态； 分割模块，用于利用目标图像分割网络对所述受电弓运行图像进行分割处理，得到初始分割图像； 判定模块，用于基于像素面积判定规则对所述初始分割图像进行像素判定，得到判定结果； 分析模块，用于在所述判定结果表征所述初始分割图像满足所述像素面积判定规则的情况下，对所述初始分割图像进行连通区域分析处理，得到分析结果； 确定模块，用于在所述分析结果表征所述初始分割图像的连通区域满足预设区域数量 阈值的情况下，将所述初始分割图像确定为用于异常检测的目标分割图像。 11 .一种用于受电弓异常检测的列车，包括如权利要求10所述的图像处理装置。 12 . 一种电子设备，包括： 一个或多个处理器； 存储器，用于存储一个或多个程序， 其中，当所述一个或多个程序被所述一个或多个处理器执行时，使得所述一个或多个处理器实现权利要求1至9中任一项所述的方法。

An image processing method for pantograph abnormality detection, comprising: in response to an image processing instruction, obtaining a pantograph operation image of a pantograph in an abnormal working state, wherein the abnormal working state includes an abnormal environmental state and/or an abnormal pantograph state; and/or using a smoke device to spray the pantograph to simulate a haze environment; and/or using a flow field simulation device to blow air to the pantograph to simulate a storm environment; and/or using a background simulation device to simulate the working background environment of the pantograph. 4 .The method according to claim 1, wherein obtaining a pantograph operation image of a pantograph in an abnormal working state comprises: when the abnormal working state is an abnormal state of the pantograph, adjusting and processing the target components of the pantograph to obtain an abnormal pantograph; and/or adjusting the working state of the second target component to obtain the abnormal pantograph, wherein the second target component includes a pantograph lifting system. 6 .The method according to claim 1, wherein the target image segmentation network is trained in the following manner: obtaining an image training set, wherein the image training set includes a plurality of pantograph operation sample images and a label image corresponding to each of the pantograph operation sample images, and the label image includes a pixel identifier of the pantograph sample; inputting the pantograph operation sample image into an initial image segmentation network, and outputting a fused image, wherein the initial image segmentation network is generated based on a visual self-supervised model and a feature pyramid network; inputting the fused image and the label image corresponding to the fused image into a target loss function, and outputting a loss result. Iteratively adjusting the network parameters of the initial image segmentation network according to the loss result to obtain the trained target image segmentation network. 7 .The method according to claim 6, wherein the pantograph operation sample image is input into the initial image segmentation network and a fused image is output, comprising: using the visual self-supervised model to process the pantograph operation sample image to obtain a first image feature; generating a second determination result when the number of pixels does not satisfy the first number interval, wherein the determination result includes the first determination result or the second determination result. 9 .The method according to claim 1, wherein the initial segmented image includes a bow head area, a support rod area and a base area, and the preset area quantity threshold includes a second quantity interval, a third quantity interval and a fourth quantity interval; wherein the initial segmented image is subjected to connected area analysis processing to obtain an analysis result, including: generating a first analysis result when the number of components in the bow head area satisfies the second quantity interval; generating a second analysis result when the number of components in the support rod area satisfies the third quantity interval; generating a third analysis result when the number of components in the base area satisfies the fourth quantity interval; generating the analysis result based on the first analysis result, the second analysis result and the third analysis result. 10 . An image processing device for pantograph abnormality detection, comprising: an acquisition module, for responding to an image processing instruction to acquire a pantograph operation image of a pantograph in an abnormal working state, wherein the abnormal working state includes an abnormal environmental state and/or an abnormal pantograph state; a segmentation module, for performing segmentation processing on the pantograph operation image using a target image segmentation network to obtain an initial segmented image; a judgment module, for performing pixel judgment on the initial segmented image based on a pixel area judgment rule to obtain a judgment result; an analysis module, for performing connected area analysis processing on the initial segmented image to obtain an analysis result when the judgment result indicates that the initial segmented image satisfies the pixel area judgment rule; a determination module, for determining that the analysis result indicates that the connected area of the initial segmented image satisfies a preset number of areas. When the threshold is set, the initial segmented image is determined as the target segmented image for abnormality detection. 11 .A train for pantograph anomaly detection, comprising the image processing device as claimed in claim 10. 12 . An electronic device, comprising: one or more processors; a memory for storing one or more programs, wherein when the one or more programs are executed by the one or more processors, the one or more processors implement the method described in any one of claims 1 to 9.

title: A DEFECT DETECTION METHOD FOR INDUSTRIAL RADIOGRAPHIC WELD IMAGES; 一种用于工业射线焊缝图像的缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明涉及工业射线焊缝技术领域，具体涉及一种用于工业射线焊缝图像的缺陷检测方法，包括如下步骤：步骤一、获取焊缝缺陷识别准确率最优的分类器并且设定分类器对于焊缝缺陷识别的概率值；步骤二、采用X射线机拍摄实验焊缝，与已知的公有技术相比，具有如下有益效果：本发明通过对实验焊缝分别进行有无铅板的对比检测，计算出X射线机对焊缝检测存在的误差均值JZ，使X射线机对实际焊缝进行检测时，能够将误差均值考虑在内从而与分类器设定的焊缝缺陷识别概率值进行对比判断，解决了现有技术中对焊缝检测判断时避免工件内壁其他部分的散射线影响实际检测结果的情况。

The present invention relates to the technical field of industrial ray welds, and in particular to a defect detection method for industrial ray weld images, comprising the following steps: step one, obtaining a classifier with the best weld defect recognition accuracy and setting a probability value for weld defect recognition by the classifier; step two, photographing an experimental weld with an X-ray machine. Compared with the known public technology, the present invention has the following beneficial effects: by performing comparative detection on the experimental welds with and without lead plates, the present invention calculates an error mean value JZ existing in weld detection by the X-ray machine, so that when the X-ray machine detects the actual weld, the error mean value can be taken into account, thereby performing a comparative judgment with the weld defect recognition probability value set by the classifier, thereby solving the problem in the prior art of avoiding the influence of scattered rays from other parts of the inner wall of the workpiece on the actual detection result when detecting and judging the weld.
claims:

L A defect detection method for industrial ray weld images, characterized in that it includes the following steps: Step 1, obtain a classifier with the best weld defect recognition accuracy and set the probability value of the classifier for weld defect recognition; Step 2, use an X-ray machine to shoot the experimental weld, collect images and input them into the trained improved NanoDet deep network, and obtain experimental weld image data after feature enhancement, feature conversion and standardization, and mark it as SY", where i represents different experimental weld data, i = 1, 2, ..., n; Step 3, place a lead plate at the bottom of the experimental weld, use an X-ray machine to shoot the experimental weld, collect images and input them into the trained improved NanoDet deep network, and obtain standard experimental weld image data after feature enhancement, feature conversion and standardization, and mark it as BZp, where p represents different experimental weld data, p = 1, 2, ..., n; Step 4, respectively compare SY], SY?, ...SY. with BZ], BZ?, ...BZr in turn, and use the formula: WC n = (SY"BZ ) k calculates the corresponding error value: WCrWC2......WJ, (where k is the error coefficient) and averages the obtained WQ to obtain JZ, JZ _ +WQ...WQ. η ' Step 5. Use an X-ray machine to shoot the actual weld, receive the real-time picture in advance, and connect the outer contour of the picture to obtain the outer contour curve of the still picture to be processed, and then use the edge detection algorithm to detect the contour edge line, so that the X-ray machine shoots the middle position of the real-time picture, that is, the centering of the real-time picture is completed; Step 6. Collect the image and input it into the trained improved NanoDet deep network. After feature enhancement, feature conversion and standardization, the actual experimental weld image data is obtained and marked as SJy, where y represents different actual weld data, y = l, 2, , n; Step 7. Subtract the data of JZ from the data of the actual weld image data SJy to obtain the final actual data ZZy, that is, ZZy = (SJ"JZ)h, (where h is the error coefficient value), is input into the classifier, and the classifier identifies the weld defects in the image feature data. If the recognition probability value of the actual weld defect is 2 the weld defect recognition probability value set by the classifier, it is judged that the actual weld has defects, otherwise the actual weld is normal. 2 .A defect detection method for industrial X-ray weld images according to claim 1, characterized in that the specific algorithm of the probability value in step 1 is as follows; S1. Selecting a number of weld image data taken by an X-ray machine, and performing preprocessing on the weld image data including image cropping and size normalization; S2, performing Fourier transform on the preprocessed weld image data to obtain its amplitude spectrum, and taking the first quadrant part of the Fourier transform amplitude spectrum as image feature data; S3, respectively marking defective images and normal images for the image feature data and constituting all samples, randomly selecting a part of all samples to form a training set matrix, and the rest to form a test set matrix; S4. Input the training set matrix into the support vector machine algorithm and obtain the weld defect classifier through training. Use the test set matrix to verify the classifier performance. By adjusting the ratio of the training set matrix to the test set matrix in all samples, the classifier with the best weld defect recognition accuracy is obtained for subsequent automatic image classification, and the probability value of the classifier for weld defect recognition is set. 3 .A defect detection method for industrial X-ray weld images according to claim 1, characterized in that the NanoDet is a FC0S-style single-stage anchor-free target detection model, which uses ATSS for target sampling and uses the Generalized Focal Loss loss function to perform classification and box regression. 4 . According to a defect detection method for industrial X-ray weld images as described in claim 1, it is characterized in that the edge detection algorithm in step five can be one of the differential method, differential edge detection algorithm, and Roberts edge detection operator.

title: MACHINE LEARNING METHOD IMPLEMENTED IN AOI DEVICE
abstract: A machine learning method is used for improving accuracy of an automated optical inspection (AOI) device. The method includes obtaining an image of a component to be inspected, processing the image to generate digital image information, establishing a machine learning model according to the digital image information, inputting the digital image information into the machine learning model for determination, verifying accuracy of a result of determination by the machine learning model, adjusting and optimizing the machine learning model according to the result of determination of the accuracy of the machine learning model, and improving the machine learning model until the machine learning model reaches a predetermined accuracy.
claims: WE CLAIM: 1. A machine learning method for improving accuracy of an automated optical inspection (AOI) device, the method comprising: obtaining an image of a component to be inspected; processing the image to generate digital image information; establishing a machine learning model according to the digital image information; inputting the digital image information into the machine learning model for determination; verifying accuracy of a result of determination by the machine learning model; and adjusting and optimizing the machine learning model according to the result of determination of the accuracy of the machine learning model; wherein above process is repeated until the machine learning model reaches a predetermined accuracy. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the step of processing the image comprises: cropping the image to a predetermined size to center the component in the image; and standardizing a pixel value of each pixel of the image according to a predetermine rule to generate the digital image information. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the step of verifying accuracy of a result of determination by the machine learning model comprises: sending pictures determined by the machine learning model to be unqualified to a platform for visual inspection by an operator; and comparing a result of determination by the operator to the result of determination by the machine learning model. 4. The method of claim 3, wherein the step of adjusting and optimizing the machine learning model according to the result of determination of the accuracy of the machine learning model comprises: adjusting and optimizing the machine learning model if the result of determination by the machine learning model is not the same as the result of determination by the operator; and verifying the accuracy of the result of determination by the machine learning model if the result of determination by the machine learning model is the same as the result of determination by the operator. 5. The method of claim 4 further comprising: saving the machine learning model to the AOI device after the machine learning model is verified. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein: the machine learning model is established by a convolutional neural network. 7. The method of claim 6, wherein: the machine learning model comprises at least four convolution layers, at least four maximum pooling layers, and at least two fully connected layers. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the machine learning model is established by: establishing a corresponding machine learning model for each kind of component. 9. The method of claim 1 further comprising: implementing the machine learning model in the AIO device; obtaining an image of a next component to be inspected; processing the image of the next component to be inspected to generate digital image information; and inputting the digital image information of the image of the next component to be inspected into the machine learning model for determination.
problem_context: A machine learning method is used for improving accuracy of an automated optical inspection (AOI) device.

title: NATURAL LEATHER DEFECT SEGMENTATION METHOD BASED ON MLP MULTILAYER NEURAL NETWORK; 基于MLP多层神经网络的天然皮革缺陷分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开了基于MLP多层神经网络的天然皮革缺陷分割方法，包括：通过图像采集模块获取皮革图像的数据集，将数据集分为训练集和测试集；根据颜色不同，生成皮革颜色特征图；以特征向量作为MLP多层神经网络的输入，经过MLP多层神经网络的特征训练完成皮革缺陷分割模型的构建；将模型文件进行存储；使用传统图像处理方法预处理待分割的皮革图像，使用模型进行皮革图像预测，得到皮革图像的缺陷分割图；使用传统图像处理方法丰富缺陷分割图的细节；提取皮革的外轮廓和缺陷轮廓，转换成DXF文件。本发明适用于皮革的缺陷分割，能够解决分割效率低和分割不够精细的技术问题，降低人工成本，提高生产效率。

The invention discloses a natural leather defect segmentation method based on an MLP multilayer neural network, which includes: acquiring a data set of leather images through an image acquisition module, dividing the data set into a training set and a test set; generating a leather color feature map according to different colors ; Take the feature vector as the input of the MLP multilayer neural network, and complete the construction of the leather defect segmentation model through the feature training of the MLP multilayer neural network; store the model file; use the traditional image processing method to preprocess the leather image to be segmented, use The model predicts the leather image and obtains the defect segmentation map of the leather image; uses traditional image processing methods to enrich the details of the defect segmentation map; extracts the outer contour and defect contour of the leather and converts it into a DXF file. The invention is suitable for the defect division of leather, can solve the technical problems of low division efficiency and insufficient division, reduces labor costs, and improves production efficiency.

title: NON-WOVEN FABRIC SURFACE SMALL DEFECT DETECTION METHOD BASED ON MULTI-CORE SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE; 基于多核支持向量机的无纺布表面小缺陷检测方法
abstract:
本发明是一种基于多核支持向量机的无纺布表面小缺陷检测方法，属检测技术领域。该方法采集具有代表性的无纺布图像，获取高分辨率的原始图像；对原始图像进行灰度变换和滤波去噪预处理；计算求出相对应的灰度共生矩阵，使用该矩阵对预处理后的图像进行图像纹理特征的提取和分析；选择合适的基核函数进行组合，得到新的核函数，对核函数的参数进行优化；构建基于新的核函数的多核支持向量机模型，使用该向量机对待检测图像进行分类，完成缺陷识别。本发明使用多核支持向量机对图像中的小缺陷进行检测，没有庞大的计算量，具有很好的检测性能。采用本发明方法进行无纺布表面小缺陷检测，可获得较高的信噪比，且背景抑制能力较强。

The invention is a method for detecting small defects on the surface of a non-woven fabric based on a multi-core support vector machine, and belongs to the technical field of detection. This method collects representative non-woven fabric images to obtain high-resolution original images; performs gray-scale transformation and filtering and denoising preprocessing on the original images; calculates the corresponding gray-level co-occurrence matrix, and uses the matrix to predict The processed image is used to extract and analyze image texture features; select the appropriate base kernel function to combine to obtain a new kernel function, and optimize the parameters of the kernel function; construct a multi-core support vector machine model based on the new kernel function, and use The vector machine classifies the image to be inspected and completes the defect recognition. The invention uses a multi-core support vector machine to detect small defects in an image, does not have a huge amount of calculation, and has good detection performance. By adopting the method of the present invention to detect small defects on the surface of the non-woven fabric, a higher signal-to-noise ratio can be obtained, and the background suppression ability is stronger.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR DETECTING HAIRLINE DEFECTS IN STEEL PLATE ROLLING PROCESS; 一种钢板轧制过程发纹缺陷的检测方法及系统
abstract:
本发明涉及数据处理技术领域，具体涉及一种钢板轧制过程发纹缺陷的检测方法及系统，该方法包括采集钢板上、下表面灰度图像，利用灰度直方图对上、下表面灰度图进行灰度线性变化得到第一上、下表面灰度图。对第一上、下表面灰度图进行自适应阈值分割得到二值图。对二值图进行连通域分析得到连通域集合，获取连通域集合中每个连通域的最小外接矩形，根据每个最小外接矩形得到整个异常部位的角度及临近范围异常分布特征量。根据各异常部位的角度及临近异常分布特征量进行自适应形态学处理去除干扰缺陷得到增强后缺陷图像。根据增强后缺陷图像进行缺陷检测得到发纹缺陷区域，从而实现将发纹缺陷准确检测出来，提高检测精度。

The invention relates to the technical field of data processing, in particular to a method and system for detecting hairline defects in the steel plate rolling process. The grayscale of the image is linearly changed to obtain the first upper and lower surface grayscale images. A binary image is obtained by performing adaptive threshold segmentation on the first upper and lower surface grayscale images. Connected domain analysis is performed on the binary image to obtain a connected domain set, the minimum circumscribing rectangle of each connected domain in the connected domain set is obtained, and the angle of the entire abnormal part and the abnormal distribution feature quantity of the adjacent range are obtained according to each minimum circumscribing rectangle. According to the angle of each abnormal part and the characteristic value of adjacent abnormal distribution, adaptive morphological processing is performed to remove interference defects to obtain an enhanced defect image. The defect detection is performed according to the enhanced defect image to obtain the hairline defect area, so as to realize the accurate detection of the hairline defect and improve the detection accuracy.

title: AN EFFICIENCY IMPROVEMENT METHOD FOR SMALL-SCALE DEFECT DETECTION MODELS BASED ON BACKGROUND SAMPLING; 一种基于背景下采样的小规模缺陷检测模型效率提升方法
abstract:
本发明涉及一种基于背景下采样的小规模缺陷检测模型效率提升方法，所述方法包括以下步骤：步骤1：输入定义过程，步骤2：对输入图像利用特征骨干网络计算特征；步骤3：对于主干网络的输出特征，将其输入两个任务网络：中心点预测和宽高预测，进行估计目标矩形框；该技术方案采用本发明所提出的背景下采样方法能够在特征学习的池化过程中去掉更多的背景点，保留更多缺陷目标点，从而提高模型的检测精度。

This invention relates to a method for improving the efficiency of a small-scale defect detection model based on background sampling. The method includes the following steps: Step 1: Input definition process; Step 2: Calculate features of the input image using a feature backbone network; Step 3: Input the output features of the backbone network into two task networks: center point prediction and width and height prediction, to estimate the target bounding box. This technical solution uses the background sampling method proposed in this invention to remove more background points and retain more defect target points during the pooling process of feature learning, thereby improving the detection accuracy of the model.

title: A VIDEO ANOMALY DETECTION METHOD, SYSTEM, MEDIUM AND DEVICE BASED ON RECONSTRUCTION; 一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法、系统、介质及设备
abstract:
本公开提出一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法、系统、介质及设备，方法包括：将待检测视频序列进行预处理，得到原始图像；将原始图像输入训练好的重构模型，得到最终重构图，根据重构误差判断待检测视频序列是否存在异常；所述重构模型包括改进的变分自编码器和重构补充模块，改进的变分自编码器在编码器和解码器之间添加FSQ量化层和跳跃连接，用于离散化数据和捕获上下文特征，得到初步重构帧；重构补充模块用于提取异常特征构建偏移图；初步重构帧和偏移图合并为最终重构帧。通过计算原始视频帧的偏移图以补充异常检测，增强了异常特征表达；并在幂等生成网络中引入模式搜索正则化方法，缓解了生成模型中的模式崩溃问题，保证模型的稳定性。

The present disclosure proposes a method, system, medium and device for video anomaly detection based on reconstruction, the method comprising: preprocessing the video sequence to be detected to obtain the original image; inputting the original image into a trained reconstruction model to obtain the final reconstructed image, judging whether the video sequence to be detected has anomalies according to the reconstruction error; the reconstruction model comprises an improved variational autoencoder and a reconstruction supplement module, the improved variational autoencoder adds an FSQ quantization layer and a jump connection between the encoder and the decoder to discretize the data and capture context features to obtain a preliminary reconstructed frame; the reconstruction supplement module is used to extract abnormal features to construct an offset map; the preliminary reconstructed frame and the offset map are merged into the final reconstructed frame. By calculating the offset map of the original video frame to supplement the anomaly detection, the expression of abnormal features is enhanced; and the pattern search regularization method is introduced in the idempotent generation network to alleviate the pattern collapse problem in the generation model and ensure the stability of the model.
claims:
1 . 一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，包括： 获取待检测视频序列，进行预处理,得到原始图像； 将原始图像输入训练好的重构模型，得到最终重构图，基于原始图像和最终重构图像计算重构误差，根据重构误差判断待检测视频序列是否存在异常； 其中，所述重构模型包括改进的变分自编码器和重构补充模块，所述改进的变分自编码器在编码器和解码器之间添加FSQ量化层和跳跃连接，用于离散化数据和捕获上下文特征，得到初步重构帧；所述重构补充模块用于提取异常特征构建偏移图;初步重构帧和偏移图合并为最终重构帧。 2 .如权利要求1所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述预处理包括:使用3D-CNN将待检测视频序列提取为视频帧，调整视频帧大小并进行强度归一化操作。 3 .如权利要求1所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述FSQ量化层对数据的离散化具体为： 根据指定级别列表创建分层结构，对数据的离散程度进行限制； 利用tanh函数对原始图像进行压缩，得到张量； 根据所述分层结构，采用Round ()操作将张量转换为相应维度的离散代码簇。 4 .如权利要求1所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述跳跃连接用于将特定编码器层的输出直接连接到相应解码器层的输入。 5 .如权利要求1所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述重构补充模块用于提取异常特征构建偏移图，具体包括： 提取原始图像的异常特征，输入到变形估计器中获取偏移量； 对偏移量进行上采样，得到标准偏移量； 将标准偏移量与原始输入的标准化坐标格网相加，形成偏移图。 6 .如权利要求1所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述初步重构帧和偏移图合并为最终重构帧，还包括:对最终重构帧进行背景去除。 7 .如权利要求1所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法，其特征在于，所述计算重构误差时计算幂等损失。 8 . 一种基于重构的视频异常检测系统，其特征在于，包括： 获取模块，用于获取待检测视频序列，进行预处理，得到原始图像； 重构模块，用于将原始图像输入训练好的重构模型，得到最终重构图，基于原始图像和最终重构图像计算重构误差，根据重构误差判断待检测视频序列是否存在异常； 其中，所述重构模型包括改进的变分自编码器和重构补充模块，所述改进的变分自编码器在编码器和解码器之间添加FSQ量化层和跳跃连接，用于离散化数据和捕获上下文特征，得到初步重构帧；所述重构补充模块用于提取异常特征构建偏移图;初步重构帧和偏移图合并为最终重构帧。 9 .一种计算机可读存储介质，其上存储有计算机程序，其特征在于，所述程序被处理器执行时实现如权利要求1-7中任一项所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法中的步骤。 10 . 一种计算机设备，包括存储器、处理器及存储在存储器上并可在处理器上运行的计算机程序，其特征在于，所述处理器执行所述程序时实现如权利要求1 - 7中任一项所述的一种基于重构的视频异常检测方法中的步骤。

1 . A video anomaly detection method based on reconstruction, characterized in that it includes: obtaining a video sequence to be detected, performing preprocessing to obtain an original image; inputting the original image into a trained reconstruction model to obtain a final reconstructed image, calculating a reconstruction error based on the original image and the final reconstructed image, and judging whether there is an anomaly in the video sequence to be detected according to the reconstruction error; wherein the reconstruction model includes an improved variational autoencoder and a reconstruction supplement module, the improved variational autoencoder adds an FSQ quantization layer and a jump connection between the encoder and the decoder to discretize data and capture contextual features to obtain a preliminary reconstructed frame; the reconstruction supplement module is used to extract abnormal features to construct an offset map; the preliminary reconstructed frame and the offset map are merged into a final reconstructed frame. 2 .A reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in claim 1, characterized in that the preprocessing includes: using 3D-CNN to extract the video sequence to be detected into video frames, adjusting the video frame size and performing intensity normalization operations. 3 .A reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in claim 1 is characterized in that the discretization of data by the FSQ quantization layer is specifically as follows: a hierarchical structure is created according to a specified level list to limit the degree of discreteness of the data; the original image is compressed using the tanh function to obtain a tensor; according to the hierarchical structure, the tensor is converted into a discrete code cluster of the corresponding dimension using a Round() operation. 4 .A reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in claim 1, characterized in that the jump connection is used to directly connect the output of a specific encoder layer to the input of a corresponding decoder layer. 5 .A reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in claim 1 is characterized in that the reconstruction supplement module is used to extract abnormal features to construct an offset map, specifically including: extracting abnormal features of the original image and inputting them into the deformation estimator to obtain the offset; upsampling the offset to obtain a standard offset; adding the standard offset to the standardized coordinate grid of the original input to form an offset map. 6 .A reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in claim 1 is characterized in that the preliminary reconstructed frame and the offset map are merged into a final reconstructed frame, and also includes: background removal of the final reconstructed frame. 7 .A reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in claim 1, characterized in that the idempotent loss is calculated when calculating the reconstruction error. 8 . A video anomaly detection system based on reconstruction, characterized in that it includes: an acquisition module, used to acquire a video sequence to be detected, perform preprocessing, and obtain an original image; a reconstruction module, used to input the original image into a trained reconstruction model to obtain a final reconstructed image, calculate a reconstruction error based on the original image and the final reconstructed image, and judge whether there is an anomaly in the video sequence to be detected according to the reconstruction error; wherein the reconstruction model includes an improved variational autoencoder and a reconstruction supplement module, the improved variational autoencoder adds an FSQ quantization layer and a jump connection between the encoder and the decoder to discretize data and capture contextual features to obtain a preliminary reconstructed frame; the reconstruction supplement module is used to extract abnormal features to construct an offset map; the preliminary reconstructed frame and the offset map are merged into a final reconstructed frame. 9 .A computer-readable storage medium having a computer program stored thereon, characterized in that when the program is executed by a processor, the steps in a reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in any one of claims 1-7 are implemented. 10 . A computer device, comprising a memory, a processor, and a computer program stored in the memory and executable on the processor, wherein when the processor executes the program, the steps of a reconstruction-based video anomaly detection method as described in any one of claims 1 to 7 are implemented.

title: A METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR ABNORMAL DETECTION OF ROADSIDE TRAFFIC SAFETY AND GREENING FACILITIES; 一种路侧交安、绿化设施异常检测方法及系统
abstract:
本发明涉及一种路侧交安、绿化设施异常检测方法及系统，其中路侧交安、绿化设施异常检测方法，包括以下步骤：云台监控相机从初始的预设位置出发，采集图像，采集的图像经过深度学习模型，生成相机运动控制指令，指导所述云台监控相机进行下一步的动作，使所述云台监控相机可以自动对路侧区域进行巡视，同时，巡视中采集的图像将经传统机器视觉或深度学习模型分析，判断是否出现异常状况，若出现异常状况将进行信息上报至数据后台。其利用机器视觉及深度学习方法，在设置基础预置位的基础上，自动控制云台相机转动、拉伸镜头远近，实现对路侧交安设施、绿化设施图像采集，同时利用深度学习算法，自动判定交安设施、绿化设施是否出现异常状况。

The present invention relates to a method and system for abnormal detection of roadside traffic safety and greening facilities, wherein the method for detecting abnormality of roadside traffic safety and greening facilities comprises the following steps: the pan-tilt monitoring camera starts from an initial preset position, collects images, collects The images of the pan-tilt monitoring camera are generated through a deep learning model to generate camera motion control instructions to guide the pan-tilt monitoring camera to perform the next action, so that the pan-tilt monitoring camera can automatically patrol the roadside area. At the same time, the images collected during the patrol will be Through the analysis of traditional machine vision or deep learning model, it is judged whether there is an abnormal situation. If there is an abnormal situation, the information will be reported to the data background. It uses machine vision and deep learning methods to automatically control the rotation of the pan-tilt camera and stretch the distance of the lens on the basis of setting the basic preset position, so as to realize the image collection of traffic safety facilities and greening facilities on the roadside. At the same time, it uses deep learning algorithms to Automatically determine whether traffic safety facilities and greening facilities are abnormal.
